title: Verify existing implementation of search filter builder
description: The `buildSearchFilter(query: string, fields: string[]): object` function already exists in `src/services/search-filter.ts` with 8 passing tests in `src/services/search-filter.test.ts`. Implementation uses Payload `Where` type, returns empty object for empty inputs, and builds an `or` clause with `like` conditions across all fields.
existing_patterns: src/services/course-search.ts and src/services/discussions.ts — similar Payload where-clause patterns using `like` operators
